warlord.name: Warlord
warlord.description: Focus on military might. Troop costs reduced by 10%, levy size increased by 15%.

merchant.name: Merchant Prince
merchant.description: Focus on trade and wealth. Kingdom generates 15% more gold, development grows 20% faster.

architect.name: Grand Architect
architect.description: Focus on building and infrastructure. Building costs reduced by 15%, build time reduced by 20%.

scholar.name: Scholar King
scholar.description: Focus on knowledge and faith. Piety and learning gains increased by 25%, innovation progress doubled.

diplomat.name: Silver Tongue
diplomat.description: Focus on diplomacy and alliances. Opinion boost with all rulers, marriage acceptance increased.

spymaster.name: Shadow Ruler
spymaster.description: Focus on intrigue and plots. Scheme power increased by 30%, hostile scheme discovery chance reduced.

conqueror.name: Conqueror
conqueror.description: Focus on expansion. War score from battles increased by 25%, siege speed increased by 20%.

pious.name: Defender of Faith
pious.description: Focus on religious authority. Piety income doubled, fervor bonus, holy war casus belli.
